title: notopleura nivea
intro: Notopleura nivea is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the White Notopleura, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Notopleura nivea include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
